allow:
Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$lines = Get-Content 'data/crafted/pools/crafted_str_chest_armor.json'
\\$first930 = \\$lines | Select-Object -First 930
\\$first930 | Out-File -FilePath 'data/crafted/pools/crafted_str_chest_armor_temp.json' -Encoding UTF8
Move-Item -Force 'data/crafted/pools/crafted_str_chest_armor_temp.json' 'data/crafted/pools/crafted_str_chest_armor.json'
")
